soups.description: Hearty enough to make a lumberjack weep with joy.

soups.description: The fridge-cleanout soup that somehow always tastes intentional.

soups.description: The leftovers-from-Easter soup that outshines the original ham.

soups.description: Clam chowder's lesser-known sibling who honestly might be more talented.

soups.name: Lobster and Truffle Bisque
